advisories.compromised_tag_pattern: Most version tags between 0.50.x and 0.58.x were retroactively modified on 2026-03-19 and 2026-03-22
advisories.description: TeamPCP hijacked 75 of 76 version tags. Backdoored images contain infostealer targeting CI/CD secrets, cloud credentials, SSH keys, Docker configs. Second wave on March 22.
advisories.action: BLOCK pull. Pin to verified SHA256 digest only. Check https://github.com/aquasecurity/trivy/security/advisories for verified safe digests.

advisories.description: TeamPCP hijacked 75 of 76 version tags in the GitHub Action. Used to steal cloud credentials from 10,000+ downstream workflows. Encrypted exfiltration to attacker C2.
advisories.action: BLOCK. Pin to verified commit SHA only. Do not use mutable tags.

notes: Compromised Docker image registry. Checked by Claude Code hook before docker pull/compose operations. Managed via APS record #41.
